---
title: "continuous-mebart-demo"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{continuous-mebart-demo}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(meBART)
library(tidyverse)
library(latex2exp)
```

# Toy Example

$$f(x) = 1_{[0, \infty)}(x)$$

# Generate Synthetic Data

```{r}

# Set overall seed
MY_SEED <- 0

# Fix random seed to make the results reproducible
set.seed(MY_SEED)

# number of observations
n <- 100

# standard deviation of measurement error and output, respectively
sigma_meas <- 0.1
sigma_y <- 0.1

# Generate x values ~ N(0, 0.3) and add measurement error
x_true <- rnorm(n, 0, 0.3)
x_meas <- x_true + rnorm(n, 0, sigma_meas)
y_true <- -1 + 2 * (x_true >= 0) # Indicator function
y_obs <- y_true + rnorm(n, 0, sigma_y)

# Convert to df
df_me <- data.frame(X=x_meas, y=y_obs, X_true=x_true, y_true=y_true)
```

# Run Models

```{r}

f = file()
sink(f)

# Hyper-parameters
ndpost <- 2000 # (Default: 1000L)
nskip <- 200 # (Default: 100L)
ntree <- 200 # (Default: 200L)

# Extra meBART parameters
meas_error_sigma <- 0.01*diag(x=1, nrow=1, ncol=1) # Covariance matrix for measurement error
x_mu = matrix(0) # Mean vector for X
x_sigma = matrix(0.3^2) # Covariance matrix for X

# Vanilla BART
set.seed(MY_SEED)
mdl_BART <- BART::wbart(df_me$X, df_me$y, 
                         nskip=nskip, ndpost=ndpost, ntree=ntree)


# meBART
set.seed(MY_SEED)
mdl_meBART <- meBART::mebart_cont(df_me$X, df_me$y, 
                         nskip=nskip, ndpost=ndpost, ntree=ntree, 
                         meas_error_sigma=meas_error_sigma,                         
                         x_mu = x_mu,
                         x_sigma = x_sigma)


closeAllConnections()

cat("Time taken for Vanilla BART: ", mdl_BART$proc.time[[3]], "s\n", sep="")
cat("Time taken for meBART: ", mdl_meBART$proc.time[[3]], "s\n", sep="")


```


# Make Predictions Along Domain of X

```{r}
# Make predictions at every unique cutpoint value for BART
values <- mdl_BART$treedraws$cutpoints[[1]]
output <- predict(mdl_BART, data.frame(values))
means <- colMeans(output)

# Extract 95% CI for BART
lower_CI <- c()
upper_CI <- c()
for (i in 1:ncol(output)) {
    lower_CI <- c(lower_CI, quantile(output[,i], 0.025))
    upper_CI <- c(upper_CI, quantile(output[,i], 0.975))
}
ci_df <- data.frame(X=values, y=means, lower_CI=lower_CI, upper_CI=upper_CI)
ci_df$model <- "Vanilla BART"

# Make predictions at every unique cutpoint value for meBART
values <- mdl_meBART$treedraws$cutpoints[[1]]
output <- predict(mdl_meBART, data.frame(values))
means <- colMeans(output)

# Extract 95% CI for meBART
lower_CI <- c()
upper_CI <- c()
for (i in 1:ncol(output)) {
    lower_CI <- c(lower_CI, quantile(output[,i], 0.025))
    upper_CI <- c(upper_CI, quantile(output[,i], 0.975))
}
ci_df2 <- data.frame(X=values, y=means, lower_CI=lower_CI, upper_CI=upper_CI)
ci_df2$model <- "meBART"

# Combine dataframes
ci_df_combined <- rbind(ci_df, ci_df2)
ci_df_combined$model <- factor(ci_df_combined$model, levels = c("Vanilla BART", "meBART"))

```




# Plot Learned Functions


```{r}

ci_plot <- ggplot(ci_df_combined) +
    facet_grid(cols = vars(model)) +
    geom_line(aes(x=X, y=y), linetype=3) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(x=X, ymin=lower_CI, ymax=upper_CI), alpha=0.2) +
    labs(title = "Vanilla BART vs. meBART: Mean Prediction with 95% CI", 
         x = "X", 
         y = "Y") +
    geom_point(data=df_me, aes(x = X, y = y), color="#619CFF") +
    annotate("segment", x = -0.6, xend = 0, y = -1, yend = -1, linetype = "solid") +
    annotate("segment", x = 0, xend = 0.6, y = 1, yend = 1, linetype = "solid") +
    annotate("point", x = 0, y = -1, size = 3, shape = 1) +
    annotate("point", x = 0, y = 1, size = 3, shape = 16) 

ci_plot

```


# Sigma Trace Plots



```{r}

# Extract sigma draws
sigma_df <- data.frame(iter_num = seq_along(mdl_meBART$sigma), sigma = mdl_meBART$sigma, method = "meBART")
sigma_df2 <- data.frame(iter_num = seq_along(mdl_BART$sigma), sigma = mdl_BART$sigma, method = "Vanilla BART")

# Combine dfs
sigma_df <- rbind(sigma_df, sigma_df2)
sigma_df$method <- factor(sigma_df$method, levels = c("Vanilla BART", "meBART"))

# Create the ggplot line plot
sigma_plot <- ggplot(sigma_df, aes(x = iter_num, y = sigma, color=method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point(alpha=0) +
    labs(x = "MCMC Iteration", y = TeX("sigma, $\\sigma$"), title = "\nPosterior Draws of Sigma") +
    geom_hline(yintercept=sigma_y, color="black", linetype="dashed") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

sigma_plot

```
# Coverage Calculation


```{r}

# Get Vanilla BART coverage
BART_coverage <- c()

for (i in 1:nrow(ci_df)){
    x_val <- -1+2*(ci_df$X[i] > 0) # Apply known true function
    if (ci_df$lower_CI[i] <= x_val && ci_df$upper_CI[i] >= x_val){
        BART_coverage <- c(BART_coverage, 1)
    } else {
        BART_coverage <- c(BART_coverage, 0)
    }
}
print(paste("Vanilla BART coverage: ", mean(BART_coverage), sep=""))


# Get meBART coverage
meBART_coverage <- c()
for (i in 1:nrow(ci_df2)){
    x_val <- -1+2*(ci_df2$X[i] > 0) # Apply known true function
    if (ci_df2$lower_CI[i] <= x_val && ci_df2$upper_CI[i] >= x_val){
        meBART_coverage <- c(meBART_coverage, 1)
    } else {
        meBART_coverage <- c(meBART_coverage, 0)
    }
}

print(paste("meBART coverage: ", mean(meBART_coverage), sep=""))


```

# Updated Estimation of X


```{r}


# Extract x draws from meBART
x_draws <- mdl_meBART$x_draws[1,,]
x_draws_means <- rowMeans(x_draws) # Get means of posteriors


df_xdata <- df_me[, c("X", "X_true")]
df_xdata$x_true_est <- x_draws_means


df_xdata <- df_xdata[order(df_xdata$X_true), ]
df_xdata$y <- 1:n

df2 <- reshape2::melt(df_xdata, id="y")

xdraws_plot <- ggplot(df2) +
    geom_point(aes(x=value, y=y, color=variable), 
               shape=19, 
               size=2) + 
    theme(axis.text.y=element_blank(),
          axis.title.y=element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.y=element_blank(),
          legend.position = "bottom") +
    labs(title=TeX("Estimation of True Value of $X_i$"), 
         x="X",
         color="Variable") +
    geom_segment(data=df_xdata, 
                 aes(x=X, xend=x_true_est, y=y, yend=y), 
                 arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.2,"cm"))) +
    scale_color_discrete(labels = unname(TeX(c("Measured Value, $X_i^*$", "True Value, $X_i$", "Estimated True Value, $\\hat{X_i}$"))))


xdraws_plot

```
